title: I19/I76-I77/I28/I4 pre-edit baseline and change manifest
content: Baseline 2026-07-22 America/Toronto. Workspace Z:\ADS (live path \\zdav\temp\ADS), branch main, clean at b053e3c071e5f65e02be5c5c37a9430e62092aac, plugin version 0.5.7.7; no version, package, publication, commit, push, or live-game action authorized. Fresh baseline passed 271/271 C# tests and 7/7 Python generator tests. Existing behavior: shop catalog supports GilShop and direct SpecialShop only; raw ENpc route indexes are used diagnostically/runtime; regular GilShop runtime remaps the visible row but no shared handler-menu resolver or additional family adapters exist; no camera recovery, solo notice, wizard catalog/window, or wizard config flags exist. Invariants: public /ads shop and IPC contracts/failure codes/phases stay compatible; shop automation remains exact, callback-free on ambiguity, no retries after callback, five-minute bounded, and no runtime vendor network; camera corrections require ADS ownership and release ADS-owned input; solo notice never changes /ads leave; wizards do not start automation. Planned manifest: modify ADS/Models/ShopPurchaseModels.cs, ADS/Services/ShopCatalogService.cs, ShopPurchaseRuntime.cs, ShopPurchaseRunner.cs, UtilityAutomationService.cs, Configuration.cs, Plugin.cs, MainWindow.cs, ConfigWindow.cs; add ShopMenuRouteResolver.cs, ShopCurrencyResolver.cs, CameraRecoveryService.cs, SoloDutyLeaveNoticeService.cs, Models/WizardCatalog.cs, Windows/WizardWindow.cs; modify generator, Python tests, generated placement catalog/audit, shop tests and add camera/notice/wizard tests; synchronize README.md, GUIDE.md, CHANGELOG.md, docs/COMMANDS.md, docs/IPC.md, docs/SHOP_PURCHASING.md, docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md and one combined dev-note. Existing user changes: none. Required backups: one ignored coherent-pass backup for every existing non-README/changelog file edited; README/CHANGELOG already have a backup inside the seven-day window and will rely on git plus that recent backup. Rollback: restore the coherent-pass backups/remove new files; generated data can be regenerated from pinned local inputs. Next: create backups, then implement camera and solo notice services/tests.
